title: hieracium vogesiacum subsp. asturicum
intro: Hieracium vogesiacum subsp. asturicum, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium vogesiacum subsp. asturicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Hawkweed can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
